text: Come on, Daramid, don't keep us in suspense!
C'mon, Daramid, don't keep us in suspense!
Come on, Farrah, don’t let Josh’s mountain of gold intimidate you — it’s just money, right?
Come on, Josh, don’t keep us in suspense—are you about to flex that fat stack or just play with your food?
Elfrip, darling, you sure you can afford to keep flirting with that pot?
